---
title: "STAT615 HW2 - Langmeyer"
author: "Alyssa Langmeyer"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  pdf_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
    number_sections: false
  word_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
    number_sections: false
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: '2'
    df_print: paged
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

# 1. Problem 4.7. Copier maintenance (p. 172, 20 pts. a-10, b-5, c-5)
```{r}
cm<-read.table("CHO1PR20.txt", header=F)
colnames(cm)<-c("minute","copier")
cm.slr<-lm(minute~copier,data=cm)
```
- function: totalminutes_hat = -0.58 + 15.03(copier)
- the family confidence level is 0.9,

# 2. Problem 6.11. (b) Grocery Retailer 

# 3. Problem 6.12. Grocery Retailer 

# 4. Problem 6.13. Grocery Retailer 

# 5. Problem 7.5 (b, add part c)

# 6. Problem 7.6

# 7. Problem 7.9

# 8. Problem 6.15.c
